summary: Tested new features: 18% commission on /become-seller, Influencer Dashboard with AI Assistant and Internal Chat. All features working correctly after fixing AI import bug.
passed_tests: Influencer AI Assistant (Hispalo AI Creativo) panel opens and displays quick prompts
Internal Chat (Mensajes) panel opens with 'Iniciar conversación' option
/api/chat/conversations returns empty list for new users (requires auth)
AI assistant correctly rejects non-influencer users with 403
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed AI import bug in /api/ai/influencer-assistant endpoint (changed from 'from emergentintegrations.llm import LLMChat' to using existing LlmChat import)

test_credentials.note: Test influencer user was created and cleaned up during testing

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test influencer user for dashboard testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Commission on /become-seller shows 18%, 2) Influencer dashboard at /influencer/dashboard works with AI Assistant (Hispalo AI Creativo) and Internal Chat components, 3) Backend endpoints /api/chat/conversations, /api/ai/influencer-assistant, /api/chat/search-users all working correctly. Fixed one bug: AI import was incorrect in influencer-assistant endpoint.

commission_18_percent.details: Commission section shows '18%' with 'Comisión de plataforma' label

features: Quick prompts (Guión de video, Caption para post, Historia promocional, Estrategia contenido, Texto para bio)

backend_endpoints./api/ai/influencer-assistant: WORKING - Returns AI-generated content for influencers

bug_fixed.old_code: from emergentintegrations.llm import LLMChat; chat = LLMChat(); chat.with_model(...); chat.with_system_prompt(...); response = chat.send_message(...)
bug_fixed.new_code: Using existing LlmChat import with proper async/await pattern: chat = LlmChat(api_key=EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, session_id=..., system_message=...); chat.with_model(...); response = await chat.send_message(UserMessage(text=...))
